assertions.description: One documented invocation (npx tsx tools/e2e/boot.ts) builds, starts detached, and waits for health
assertions.expected: boot exits 0 after printing the resolved base URL and /health body

assertions.description: Base URL resolution matches the MCP (PORT from .env)
assertions.observed: boot line: 'Booting archie via `docker compose up --build -d` (target http://localhost:3000)'

assertions.description: Healthy boot completes well within the 600s default cap
assertions.observed: ~3m40s from invocation to Healthy (log written 18:52:55–18:56:34 UTC; image layers cached from prior build)

knowledge_log: Booting archie via `docker compose up --build -d` (target http://localhost:3000) ...
